quotes.quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Success isn't always about greatness. It's about consistency.
quotes.author: Dwayne Johnson

quotes.quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln (attributed)

quotes.quote: Small disciplines repeated with consistency every day lead to great achievements.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: Do not save what is left after spending, but spend what is left after saving.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.quote: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.quote: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein (attributed)

quotes.quote: Wealth is the ability to fully experience life.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
quotes.author: James Clear

quotes.quote: Habits are the compound interest of self-improvement.
quotes.author: James Clear

quotes.quote: Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going.
quotes.author: Jim Ryun

quotes.quote: First we make our habits, then our habits make us.
quotes.author: John Dryden

quotes.quote: It's not about having time. It's about making time.
quotes.author: Charles Buxton

quotes.quote: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: You will never always be motivated, so you must learn to be disciplined.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: Consistency is what transforms average into excellence.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins (paraphrased)

quotes.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier

quotes.quote: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration, the rest of us just get up and go to work.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: If you get one percent better each day, you'll end up thirty-seven times better by the end of the year.
quotes.author: James Clear

quotes.quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.quote: The secret of your future is hidden in your daily routine.
quotes.author: Mike Murdock

quotes.quote: You don't need more time. You need fewer distractions.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.quote: Work until your idols become your rivals.
quotes.author: Drake (popularised)

quotes.quote: The pain of discipline is less than the pain of regret.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
quotes.author: Tim Ferriss

quotes.quote: Long-term consistency always beats short-term intensity.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee (inspired)

quotes.quote: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: The successful warrior is the average man with laser-like focus.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee
